blended.narrative: Ski Cooper is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 10,359 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 27".
